original_image_tags: A yellowed manila file folder or envelope flap. The word "ENCLOSURE" is stamped in red ink in the upper left corner. Handwritten reference numbers are written across the top tab in blue and red ink. The folder has a single punched hole in the center of the tab. The main body of the folder is blank. There are two punched holes near the bottom edge.

elements.description: A yellow paper folder or enclosure. Top left has a red stamp reading 'ENCLOSURE'. Handwritten pencil text across the top reads '62-83894' and red handwritten text reads '-326'. Two black hole punches are visible at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the key visual elements: a yellow manila folder with a red 'ENCLOSURE' stamp in the upper left, handwritten reference numbers at the top, and two punched holes at the bottom edge.
